co2.title: Carbon dioxide (CO₂)
co2.description: Concentration of carbon dioxide in the air. High levels can contribute to headaches, fatigue, and reduced concentration.

voc.title: Volatile organic compounds (VOC)
voc.description: Organic chemicals present in indoor air. High levels may cause headaches, nausea, or eye irritation.

pm25.title: PM2.5
pm25.description: Fine particulate matter smaller than 2.5 micrometers. It can penetrate deep into the lungs and worsen respiratory conditions.

pm10.title: PM10
pm10.description: Particulate matter smaller than 10 micrometers. It can affect airways and trigger allergic reactions.

settingsPage.title: Settings

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: You will receive alerts when thresholds are exceeded

settingsPage.loadError: Failed to load settings. Using defaults.

register.title: Create a New Account
register.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.all_normal: All values are within normal range.
alerts.some_high: Some values are at high levels.
alerts.critical: Danger! Air quality is at critical levels.

analyticsPage.dataPointsHint: {{count}} data points · each point is the average for the selected period

description.good: Air quality is satisfactory and poses little or no risk.
description.moderate: Air quality is acceptable; some pollutants may be a concern for sensitive individuals.
description.poor: Members of sensitive groups may experience health effects.
description.veryPoor: Everyone may begin to experience health effects.
description.hazardous: Health alert: everyone may experience serious health effects.

trend.title: 24-Hour Trend
trend.legendHelp: Click on labels to show or hide values

errors.tryAgainMessage: Please check your internet connection and try again
errors.historicalDataFailed: Failed to load historical sensor data
errors.noDataAvailable: No data available for the selected period

threshold.noExceededIntervals: No threshold exceedances in this period

info.exceedanceDuration: Total duration (minutes) that values stayed above threshold in the selected time window.
info.peakRecovery: Time needed to return below threshold after the highest exceedance.
info.ventilationEfficiency: Recent d(CO₂)/dt slope. Positive slope indicates weaker ventilation, negative slope indicates better ventilation.
info.vocCo2Anomaly: If CO₂ is normal and VOC is high, chemical source likelihood increases; if both are high, crowding/ventilation issue likelihood increases.
info.rollingRiskScore: Weighted average risk over the last 15/30 minutes, smoothing short spikes for a more stable risk view.

labels.noPeakExceedance: No peak exceedance in this interval.

watch.title: Live Watch
watch.last50Hint: Charts and table always display the latest 50 samples. When a new sample arrives, the oldest one is removed.
watch.noDataInWindow: No samples in the last {{period}} seconds.
watch.samplingHint: Your sensor sends data about every {{interval}} seconds. Try a wider window.
watch.periodSummaryTitle: Log and Invalid Data Period Summaries
